instruction: Help me summarize the project task status

command: DISPLAY=:1 gsettings set org.gnome.desktop.screensaver idle-activation-enabled false 2>/dev/null; DISPLAY=:1 gsettings set org.gnome.desktop.session idle-delay 0 2>/dev/null; DISPLAY=:1 xset s off 2>/dev/null; DISPLAY=:1 xset -dpms 2>/dev/null; true

python3 -c "
import openpyxl
wb = openpyxl.Workbook()
ws = wb.active
ws['A1'] = 'Task'
ws['B1'] = 'Owner'
ws['C1'] = 'Priority'
ws['D1'] = 'Status'
ws['A2'] = 'Requirements Review'
ws['B2'] = 'Li Ming'
ws['C2'] = 'High'
ws['D2'] = 'Completed'
ws['A3'] = 'UI Design'
ws['B3'] = 'Wang Fang'
ws['C3'] = 'High'
ws['D3'] = 'In Progress'
ws['A4'] = 'Backend Development'
ws['B4'] = 'Zhang Qiang'
ws['C4'] = 'High'
ws['D4'] = 'In Progress'
ws['A5'] = 'Testing'
ws['B5'] = 'Chen Ming'
ws['C5'] = 'Medium'
ws['D5'] = 'Not Started'
ws['A6'] = 'Deployment'
ws['B6'] = 'Liu Ming'
ws['C6'] = 'Low'
ws['D6'] = 'Not Started'
wb.save('/home/user/Desktop/team_tasks.xlsx')
"

phases.instruction: Help me summarize the project task status
Count the number of high-priority unfinished tasks from /home/user/Desktop/team_tasks.xlsx, append to /home/user/Desktop/task_overview.txt: 'High-priority Unfinished Tasks: 2', save
